KeysToEntries.Harralander: A fragrent herb used in restorative potions.
KeysToEntries.Snapdragon: A sweet-smelling herb used in restorative potions.
KeysToEntries.Marrentill: A bitter tasting herb used in resistance potions.
KeysToEntries.Toadflax: A spicy tasting herb used in resistance potions.
KeysToEntries.SmallAnimalFangs: Sharp little teeth used in weaponry.
KeysToEntries.MonstrousFangs: Large fangs used in creating deadly weaponry.
KeysToEntries.SwampThread: A crafting material made by spinning swamp weed.
KeysToEntries.VaultCore: A dragonkin energy source, found only within dragonkin vaults.
KeysToEntries.VaultShards: Stone imbued with remnants of dragonkin magic. Found only in dragonkin vaults.
KeysToEntries.PowerLevelBody: This is the average power level of all the equipped armour. Your power level is an indicator of your survivability when encountering threats in a zone.
KeysToEntries.BloodblightCape: A cloak commemorating a dragon's vengeance.
KeysToEntries.BramblemeadCape: A cloak to remember the simpler times.
KeysToEntries.FracturedCape: A cloak warning against the danger of hubris.
KeysToEntries.GarouCape: A cloak worn by garou nobility.
KeysToEntries.GoblinCape: A cloak reminding us that even gods can be forgotten.
KeysToEntries.AdventurersCape: A simple cloak to ward against the weather.
KeysToEntries.StormtouchedCape: A cloak depicting ancient monsters and a mage's fury.
KeysToEntries.WhisperingCape: A cloak that makes you shiver, even as it protects against the cold.

KeysToEntries.CharacterCreate.Hardcore.Title: Hardcore Mode
KeysToEntries.CharacterCreate.Hardcore.Description:
Beat Velgar on Hardcore without dying to claim an exclusive reward.

If any player dies, the reward becomes unobtainable for everyone. You must start a new Hardcore server to try again.

Hardcore mode can only be played with a Hardcore character.
KeysToEntries.World.Mode.Title: Mode:
